extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by the entities from matters against them: all “By” rows were excluded. For matters against the company, subsidiaries, directors and promoters, criminal counts are Nil (0), statutory/regulatory actions are 5 against subsidiaries, and tax proceedings are 1 against the company plus 5 against subsidiaries (6 total); the promoter disciplinary action is kept separate and not included in regulatory actions. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is ₹0.23 million plus ₹249.42 million = ₹249.65 million, or ₹24.965 crore; promoter/director matters and all “By” rows were excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as direct-tax litigation of ₹14.58 million plus arbitration of ₹31.94 million as of September 30, 2024, totaling ₹46.52 million or ₹4.652 crore; the stated capital commitment was not included. Company-wide top-customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is 27.59% for the top five and 43.66% for the top ten, measured against revenue from operations. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
